domain_expertise.evidence: Founder & CEO of Lio, multiple posts detailing end-to-end P2P automation.
Y Combinator alum, multiple venture foundings, Venture Creation track at TUM.
Management of multi-million dollar spend for Fortune 500 and Global 2000 clients.
Academic background in Industrial Engineering (BSc) and related internship/consulting roles.

soft_skills_signals.justification: Articulates a clear manifesto on replacing legacy procurement models with AI agents in his Series A announcement post.
Reflects on the necessity of protecting 'original thinking' and resisting social pressure in his March 23, 2026 post.
Recommender cites his 'readiness and motivation' to assume responsibility for 'very challenging tasks' during his time at Lab 1886.
Delivered roundtables and workshops at major industry events like Americas Procurement Congress.

data.skill_progression_narrative: Vladimir transitioned from foundational corporate project and product management roles at Siemens and Mercedes-Benz into a series of AI-focused ventures. His career trajectory shows a clear maturation from learning systems (Gabriel AI, OCR application) to building autonomous, multi-agent enterprise execution layers for the procurement industry.
data.data_confidence_rationale: Data is supported by a comprehensive LinkedIn history, explicit experience descriptions, and a recent, high-frequency stream of professional posts detailing his current operational and technical responsibilities.
